arts.ttl: Barcelona match CANCELLED as tragic death announced just minutes before kickoff
arts.sum: Barcelona were due to face Osasuna in La Liga on Saturday night, but the match didn't take place following the tragic death of team doctor Carles Minarri Garcia.

arts.ttl: Shock death sees Barcelona vs Osasuna game postponed
arts.sum: The game between FC Barcelona and Osasuna was suspended just minutes before kick-off, with reports of the death of ‘someone close to the players’ circulating. Barcelona can confirm the sad news of the death of first team doctor, Carlos Miñarro García, for this reason the game has been called off.

arts.ttl: Why Robert Lewandowski is not in Barcelona’s squad to face Osasuna
arts.sum: An explanation for the absence of Robert Lewandowski from Barcelona’s latest matchday squad has on Saturday night been provided. Barcelona, of course, are primed to return to action in short…

arts.ttl: Official: Changes aplenty as Barcelona name XI to face Osasuna
arts.sum: The XI of players selected by Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick to face Osasuna this evening has been unveiled online. And it features a whole host of changes. Barcelona are…

arts.ttl: ‘No exact date’ confirmed as Barcelona suffer fresh Camp Nou setback
arts.sum: Barcelona fans remain without a firm update over when their iconic Camp Nou home will reopen following major renovations. La Blaugrana fans are desperate to return home, but given the multiple setbacks to the construction project, it is far from certain they will be able to be back before June – despite receiving guarantees from […] The post ‘No exact date’ confirmed as Barcelona suffer fresh Camp Nou setback appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: 4 Barcelona stars tipped to depart as ‘painful’ sale considered
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona are giving consideration to what would be a ‘painful’ sale this summer. That’s according to Relevo, who have on Saturday provided an insight…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star to join club’s top earners with new contract
arts.sum: A leading member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona is in line for an improved new contract. That’s according to Relevo, who point towards Raphinha as the…

arts.ttl: Barcelona rejected a €100 million transfer offer last summer
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona knocked back an astronomical offer for a leading member of the club’s attacking ranks last summer. That’s according to Relevo, who point towards…

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi didn't speak to PSG team-mate for THREE MONTHS for badmouthing Barcelona
arts.sum: Lionel Messi ’s spell with PSG was marked by controversy and now it has been revealed that the superstar did not speak to one of his team-mates for three months after he badmouthed Barcelona . Now Leandro Paredes has admitted that his Argentina colleague went an extended time without speaking to him after he spoke badly of the Camp Nou side prior to Messi arriving in France.

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'identify 20-year-old marksman' as perfect Robert Lewandowski 'replacement'
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly join the race to sign Porto striker Samu Aghehowa during this summer's transfer window.
